message:
test(e2e): add SQL benchmark Playwright tests

Add E2E benchmark tests covering:
- Cold start timing
- Simple SELECT (100, 1000, 5000 rows)
- Aggregations (GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, AVG)
- Joins (customer-order relationships)
- Complex WHERE (multiple conditions, IN clauses)
- Window functions (ROW_NUMBER, PARTITION BY)
- CTEs (Common Table Expressions)

Test metrics: warmup (2 runs), benchmark (5 runs)
Captures: median, P95, min, max
